subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Who was the first Rana of Chittorgarh?
question_hi: चिट्टोगर के पहले रना कौन थे ?
explanation_en: Udai Singh II was the first Rana of Chittorgarh after it was captured from Mewar kingdom by Sultan Sikandar Lodi in 1458. He established himself as the ruler of Chittorgarh in 1460.
explanation_hi: 1458 में Mewar kingdom ka Chittorgarh ka capture ho gaya, iske baad Sultan Sikandar Lodi se Udai Singh II Rana ki bana diya. Ek baar purane Rana ki baat chali jayegi, Udai Singh II ki baat hai, उदय सिंग २ तक चीटरगंगार को बनाया गया, इसको यात्रा सिंग २ के निवसन के बाद, Udai Singh II ने चीटरगंगार को बना गया गया।
explanation_en: After the capture of Chittorgarh by Sultan Sikandar Lodi, Udai Singh II established himself as the ruler of Chittorgarh in 1460.
explanation_hi: सिंग २ के वन के बाद, Udai Singh II ने चीटरगंगार को बनाया गया, १८६० में

subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which Rajput kingdoms were present in Rajasthan during the medieval period?
question_hi: मध्यवर्तीतीय समय में Rajput राजधानेवाले राजमंडलों
A_en: During the medieval period, Rajasthan witnessed the rise of several Rajput kingdoms. Some of them are:
A_hi: मध्यवर्तीतीय सम्यावर मंडल को विकारी की में बनाया गया।
B_en: Some of the prominent Rajput kingdoms that existed during that time were
B_hi: उनके पराजीतीय सम्यावर मंडल को बनाया गया।
C_en: The following are the prominent Rajput kingdoms that flourished during the medieval period in Rajasthan.
C_hi: उल्यावर मंडल को विकारी की में बनाया गयां।
D_en: The Rajput kingdoms that played a significant role during the medieval period in Rajasthan were
D_hi: उल्यावर मंडल को विकारी की में बनाया गयां।
E_en: Some of the major Rajput kingdoms that existed during the medieval era in Rajasthan were
E_hi: उल्यावर मंडल को विकारी की में बनाया गयां।
